# CWE-838: Inappropriate Encoding for Output Context (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-838-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Notice struct {
	Title string `json:"title"`
	Body  string `json:"body"`
}

// Vulnerable: emits invalid UTF-8 bytes while declaring UTF-8 JSON to downstream clients.
// Malformed sequences can break parsers that trust the charset declaration.
func PublishNotice(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	notice := Notice{Title: "Alert", Body: "update"}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte{0xC3, 0x28})
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(notice)
}
